query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isCombo, COUNT(cg.id) as complementGroupCount 
FROM products p 
LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 
GROUP BY p.id 
HAVING complementGroupCount > 0 
LIMIT 20
